text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking around town on<n>my day off...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Fine. You done yet or what?<n>Let's head
back already.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No can do! ♪ We've only just started<n>our ramen
tour!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We've already been to three<n>restaurants...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those were just warmups! You said<n>you'd escort
me, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You've got to play along, or I miiight<n>just decide
not to give you my data<n>after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. I should've been more specific<n>about the
deal...

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian A
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, it's Air Shakur! She looks even<n>scarier in
the flesh...

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's always on edge. I don't<n>envy
whoever's racing her next,<n>'cause she looks
ready to fly off the<n>handle again.

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian A
text_block_list.text: Oh crap. Think she can hear us?

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian B
text_block_list.text: Probably. Let's get out of here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Shakur. I didn't understand all of<n>those
words. Did they mean you look<n>strong?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, idiot. They're bad-mouthing me.<n>Saying that
I'm an antisocial freak<n>who's gonna get someone
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What?! Really? That's so rude! I'm<n>going to go
set them straight!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't be stupid. There's no point.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But... doesn't it make you sad?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: As if. Why should I care? Not myproblem.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Background noise like that isn't<n>worth factoring
into anything, so I<n>just filter it all out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Sides, they'll shut up if I win enough.<n>So, just
leave 'em be.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see... Shakur, you really are noble.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? How did you get that from what<n>I just said?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You keep working towards your<n>goals, no matter
what. I think that's<n>really noble.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But if the "noise" ever gets you down,<n>the sound
of slurping ramen is sure to<n>drown it out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll always be happy to join you! No<n>matter the
place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You just want to eat ramen! ...Hmph, I<n>can't
stomach people like you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I can stomach pretty much<n>anything! I'll
prove it to you at the<n>next place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant... Ugh.
